title: Well-specified small feature
hypothesis: Fusion should hold quality at lower cost: the spec is unambiguous, so implementation is delegable and the coordinator reviews.
prompt: Add an `export` command to the CLI: `node src/cli.js export --json` prints all stored items as pretty-printed JSON to stdout; running it without `--json` must print a usage message and exit with code 2. Follow the codebase's dominant error-handling convention, register the command in src/cli.js, add tests for both paths, and keep `npm test` passing.
